description: AgentPool control-plane companion: inspect coding-agent subscription headroom, run privacy-safe diagnostics, and delegate explicit handoffs through the official agentpool CLI.

novel_features.name: Official CLI Delegation
novel_features.description: Passes arbitrary arguments through to the official agentpool binary so advanced and newly shipped AgentPool commands remain reachable without wrapper drift.

novel_features.name: AgentPool Onboarding
novel_features.description: Shows the official uv/pipx installation and upgrade path for the Python agentpool-cli package from a catalog-native entrypoint.

novel_features.name: Agent Guidance Bridge
novel_features.description: Prints the version-matched AgentPool skill guidance from the official AgentPool CLI instead of copying guidance into this wrapper.
